news.t: VIDEO: ETF of the Week: CSHI
ETF of the Week: NEOS Enhanced Income 1-3 Month T-Bill ETF (CSHI)
NEOS Investments Announces May 2026 ETF Suite Distributions

NEOS Investments Announces October 2025 ETF Suite Distributions

overview.description: The NEOS Enhanced Income 1-3 Month T-Bill ETF (CSHI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in a portfolio of US ultra-short term Treasury bills while utilizing a combined with a US large-cap put spread futures strategy. CSHI was launched on Aug 30, 2022 and is issued by Neos.
